guardrails: Keep the root eval deterministic by default; do not require live LLM credentials for baseline scoring.
Keep invoice extraction output fields vendor_name, invoice_date, total_amount, currency, and tax_id aligned with eval.py.
Keep score at 100 on the root mock eval set before accepting changes; prefer simpler workflow code on ties.
Do not log API keys, bearer tokens, or raw credentials in eval output or results.
Keep agents editing workflow.py only; eval.py and eval_set.json remain fixed guardrails.
